meta.title: My sessions — a guided workout every day
meta.description: A guided workout every day, ready to launch. 8 varied formats, no equipment, from 5 to 40 minutes.

hero.title: Your workout for today is already waiting.
hero.subtitle: No decision to make, no equipment needed. Show up, hit play, sweat. Today's session is calibrated and ready.

benefits.no_decision_body: No program to pick, no level to set. Today's workout is already there, calibrated, ready to launch.
benefits.no_gear_body: Designed for your living room, bedroom, a park. Bodyweight only — effective and proven.
benefits.formats_body: HIIT, Tabata, EMOM, AMRAP, Pyramid, Superset, Circuit, Strength. Your body never adapts.
benefits.duration_body: You decide what you can give today. Short or long — effort counts as much as duration.

final_cta.title: Ready to sweat?
final_cta.subtitle: Create a free account. Your first workout is already programmed.
